citation: Law on Advertising No. 16/2012/QH13 — Article 9 (Comparative and ranking claims)
summary: Market share, sales ranking, and comparative superiority claims must be objective, current, and verifiable.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: No.1, best-selling, market leader, or ranking claims in Vietnamese or English. ACTION: WARN for VN scope — request ranking methodology and period. CHECK: Data source, geography, and category definition. ESCALATE IF: False competitor comparison or fabricated ranking.
